creator: simon@nitro.dk
text:
The links from http://www.dk.freebsd.org/handbook/sound.html (and other mirrors) to the subsections for sound the links does not work. This does not happen on the main site (www.freebsd.org) since the user gets redirected to http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO_8859-1/books/handbook/ as soon as the handbook link is clicked and from that "handbook directory" the links work fine.

Fix: 

Make the link on the front page directly to /doc/en_US.ISO_8859-1/books/handbook/ ?
